issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.
Installation instructions are Linux-specific, lacking steps for macOS or Windows, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Build versioned Ubuntu AMI with Nginx
scenarios.rationale: Treatment writes an HCL template using packer { required_plugins amazon } block, source amazon-ebs.ubuntu with source_ami_filter for ubuntu-jammy-22.04 owner 099720109477, shell + file provisioners, manifest post-processor, and builds with packer init then packer build -var; baseline used aws-cli image creation skipping packer's plugin/source pattern.

scenarios.name: Simultaneous AWS + GCP build from one template
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines two source blocks (amazon-ebs.base and googlecompute.base) in one HCL file and references both in build { sources = [...] } with a shared shell provisioner; baseline created two separate pipelines instead of using packer's multi-source build.
